title: lemmaphyllum drymoglossoides
intro: Lemmaphyllum drymoglossoides, also known as Drymoglossum lemmaphyllum, is a type of fern species that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lemmaphyllum drymoglossoides include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
